description: arXiv:2607.12569v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Fake speech detectors are increasingly challenged by the development of new and more accurate generative models. To cope with this problem, continual learning techniques are nowadays widely considered feasible strategies for updating models to new datasets, but they also lead to decreased performance on previously seen samples (catastrophic forg...
author: Enrico Gottardis, Mattia Tamiazzo, Simone Milani
